stemHtml: While making mass and balance calculation for a particular aeroplane, the term "Basic Empty Mass" (BEM) applies to the sum of airframe, engine(s), fixed ballast plus…

options.b: all the consumable fuel and oil, but not including any radio or navigation equipment installed by manufacturer.
options.c: unusable fuel and full operating fluids.
options.d: all the oil, fuel, and hydraulic fluid but not including crew and Traffic Load.
